entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., an important legume crop adversely affected by abiotic stresses

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stresses including heat, drought, and salinity

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress that adversely impacts plant development, growth, reproduction, and yield

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress that adversely affects chickpea

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: An abiotic stress that adversely affects chickpea

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea varieties to withstand heat stress

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A transcriptome analysis technique used to identify gene expression patterns

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of gene expression to identify differentially expressed genes

entities.name: GENOME ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The available chickpea genome sequence used for mapping RNA-Seq reads

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes showing significant expression differences between heat-tolerant and heat-sensitive genotypes

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE REAL TIME PCR
entities.description: A method used for the validation of stress responsive genes

entities.name: SNPS/INDELS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms and insertions/deletions identified between parental genotypes

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Genetic populations used for mapping, such as ICC15614 x ICC 4567 and ICC 1356 x ICC 4567
